title: ChatGPT Action schema for Bob + Claude boot for Charlie
q_summary: Write ChatGPT custom Action schema for Bob write access. Alice=Perplexity, Bob=ChatGPT, Charlie=Claude, iPhone only.
a_summary: Created spaces/bob/chatgpt-action-schema.yaml (OpenAPI 3.1 schema for GitHub contents API read+write, Bearer PAT auth). Created spaces/bob/chatgpt-action-instructions.md (step-by-step setup guide: PAT generation, Action wiring, base64 note, sequential write pattern replacing push_files). Updated G-000-charlie-boot.md to v1.2: LLM field updated to Claude, Claude iPhone note added to turn-bundle section, source field in turn.json set to claude, bootloader section renamed to Claude Project Bootloader.
decisions: OpenAPI 3.1 schema covers getFileContents (GET) and createOrUpdateFile (PUT) — the two primitives Bob needs
Bearer PAT auth scoped to repo contents read+write only
Bob slot-3 becomes sequential single-file writes (no multi-file push_files in ChatGPT Actions)
Charlie LLM = Claude — uses GitHub MCP natively, push_files works identically to Alice
source field in Charlie turn.json = claude (was chatgpt)
open_questions: Does ChatGPT iPhone app support custom Actions in Projects (not just custom GPTs)?
